ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permits" (
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit */,
  "schema" TEXT /* Schema of the permit (e.g., operating_permit.fraser_valley_health_authority) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., New Facility, Renewal) */,
  "effective_date" INTEGER /* Effective date of the permit */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility associated with the permit */,
  "tobacco" INTEGER /* Tobacco usage policy of the facility (True or False) */,
  "issue_date" INTEGER /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "expiry_date" INTEGER /* Date the permit expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permit (e.g., active, inactive, revoked) */,
  "permit_category" TEXT /* Category of the permit (e.g., new facility, renewal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permits_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the facility is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the facility is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the facility */,
  "facility_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_facility_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_type_id") REFERENCES facility_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility type */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the facility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_permits" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit associated with the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "permit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "permit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permit associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., update, renewal, revocation) */,
  "activity_date" INTEGER /* Date of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_permit_id FOREIGN KEY ("permit_id") REFERENCES permits ("permit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, reviewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role (e.g., view permits, update permits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission")
)
